text:
Market today: Tech is trying to find its footing, but the real driver is AMD's new AI system challenging Nvidia, which is always a big deal for chip stocks.

Your holdings: SMH and SOXL are flagged for attention (SELL/TRIM, both down significantly). QQQ and QQQI are also TRIM status, showing minor losses. SPAL and PTNM are new positions with notable losses. CRWD and SPY look fine for now.

Watch: AMD's new Helios system launch and how Nvidia responds. Also, the scanner setup for ZS.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your existing, heavily concentrated tech and leveraged positions.
plays: Trim QQQI if it dips below 52, your stop.
Consider trimming SMH or SOXL if they show further weakness below their current stops.
No new buys today - hold and watch.
